name: U.S. Bank Cash+™ Visa Signature® Card

welcome_offer.description: $200 cash bonus after spending $1,000 in first 3 months

earning_rates.notes: 5% cash back on purchases in category of your choice (e.g., gas, groceries, utilities)
2% cash back on purchases in second category of your choice
1% unlimited cash back on all other purchases

other_benefits.name: Cell phone protection
other_benefits.description: Up to $600 reimbursement for stolen/damaged cell phone when paying monthly bill with card

other_benefits.name: Extended Pay Plan
other_benefits.description: 0% intro APR for 12 months with U.S. Bank ExtendPay

notes: Choose your own 5% and 2% categories. Must activate categories quarterly. $100 minimum redemption.
